data.content:
source7
Data source source7

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia
The Artist_Encyclopedia.csv table contains musician profiles with Wikidata identifiers, birth dates, names, number of children, websites, residences, ethnicities, religions, start of activity dates, Twitter and Genius names, and record labels.

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.musician
Wikidata entity identifier for the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6096', 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5977', 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8349']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.birthDate
Date of birth of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['1971-10-20T00:00:00Z', '1936-09-07T00:00:00Z', '1959-10-23T00:00:00Z']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.familyNameLabel
Family name of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['Broadus', 'Holley', 'Yankovic']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.givenNameLabel
Given name of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['Cordozar', 'Hardin', 'Alfred']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.numberOfChildren
Number of children the musician has. Type: float64, Samples: [4.0]

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.websiteLabel
Official website of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['http://snoopdogg.com/', 'http://www.buddyholly.com', 'http://weirdal.com/']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.residenceLabel
City where the musician resides. Type: object, Samples: ['Del Mar']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.ethnicityLabel
Ethnicity of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['African Americans', 'African Americans']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.religionLabel
Religion of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['Islam', 'Baptists', 'Christianity']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.activityStart
Year the musician started their career. Type: object, Samples: ['1991-01-01T00:00:00Z', '1952-01-01T00:00:00Z', '1976-01-01T00:00:00Z']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.twitterNameLabel
Twitter username of the artist. Type: object, Samples: ['snoopdogg', 'alyankovic', 'tomdelonge']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.geniusNameLabel
Artist name formatted for Genius platform. Type: object, Samples: ['Snoop-dogg', 'Buddy-holly', 'Weird-al-yankovic']

source7.Artist_Encyclopedia.recordLabelLabel
Record label of the artist. Type: object, Samples: ['Death Row Records', 'Brunswick', 'Volcano Entertainment']

source8
Data source source8

source8.Performer_Registry
The Performer_Registry.csv table contains musician details including unique Wikidata IDs, names, gender, birth dates, cities, and family information. It also includes parents' names, spouse, number of children, musical kind, and personal webpages.

source8.Performer_Registry.musicianID
Wikidata entity identifier for the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6096', 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5977', 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8349']

source8.Performer_Registry.musicianName
Name of the musician, possibly including IPI numbers. Type: object, Samples: ['Bigg Snoop Dogg', '00085469927 IPI', 'Al Yankovic']

source8.Performer_Registry.genderType
Gender of the musician (m for male). Type: object, Samples: ['m', 'm', 'm']

source8.Performer_Registry.birthDate
Date of birth of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['1971-10-20T00:00:00Z', '1936-09-07T00:00:00Z', '1959-10-23T00:00:00Z']

source8.Performer_Registry.city
City where the musician was born. Type: object, Samples: ['Long Beach', 'Lubbock', 'Downey']

source8.Performer_Registry.familyName
Last name of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['Broadus', 'Holley', 'Yankovic']

source8.Performer_Registry.forename
First name of the musician. Type: object, Samples: ['Cordozar', 'Hardin', 'Alfred']

source8.Performer_Registry.fatherName
Name of the musician's father. Type: object, Samples: ['Nick Louis Yankovic']

source8.Performer_Registry.motherName
Name of the musician's mother. Type: object, Samples: ['Mary Yankovic']

source8.Performer_Registry.spouse
Name of the musician's spouse. Type: object, Samples: ['Maria Elena Holly', 'Suzanne Yankovic', 'Lil Hardin Armstrong']

source8.Performer_Registry.NChildren
Number of children the performer has. Type: float64, Samples: [4.0]

source8.Performer_Registry.kind
Type of performance or genre associated with the performer. Type: object, Samples: ['African-American music', 'rock and roll', 'humor']

source8.Performer_Registry.webpage
Official website URL of the performer. Type: object, Samples: ['http://snoopdogg.com/', 'http://www.buddyholly.com', 'http://weirdal.com/']

Musician
A musician is an individual whose profile is recorded in the data tables, with various attributes such as name, birth information, family, and career details.

Given Name
Given Name refers to the first name of a musician, with examples such as Cordozar, Hardin, and Alfred.

Wikidata Identifier
A Wikidata Identifier is a unique URI used to identify musicians in both Artist_Encyclopedia.csv and Performer_Registry.csv tables.

Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv is a data table containing details about musicians, including Wikidata IDs, names, gender, birth dates, birth cities, family information, number of children, musical genre, and official webpages.

Birth Date
Birth Date indicates the date of birth for a musician, present in both Artist_Encyclopedia.csv and Performer_Registry.csv.

Family Name
Family Name refers to the last name of a musician, with examples such as Broadus, Holley, and Yankovic.

Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv is a data table containing musician profiles with Wikidata identifiers and details such as birth dates, names, number of children, websites, residence cities, ethnicities, religions, career start dates, Twitter and Genius usernames, and record labels.

Musician Profile
A musician profile is a set of information about an individual musician, including name, birth date, ethnicity, religion, and additional biographical data.

Number Of Children
Number Of Children indicates how many children a musician has, stored as a numerical value.

Official Website
Official Website stores the URL of a musician’s main web page.

Genius Artist Name
Genius Artist Name is the musician’s formatted name for the Genius music platform.

Ethnicity
Ethnicity refers to the identified group or ancestry of the musician, such as African Americans.

Twitter Username
Twitter Username contains the musician’s Twitter handle.

Activity Start
Activity Start records the year a musician began their career.

Religion
Religion records the faith or spiritual belief associated with the musician.

Residence
Residence refers to the city where the musician currently lives.

Record Label
Record Label is the music company associated with the artist.

Gender
Gender specifies a musician’s gender.

Birth City
Birth City is the city where the musician was born.

Musical Kind
Musical Kind refers to the performance style or genre of the musician, such as African-American music, rock and roll, or humor.

Spouse Name
Spouse Name is the name of the musician’s spouse.

Musician Name
Musician Name refers to the full name, sometimes including IPI number, of the musician.

Father Name
Father Name is the name of the musician’s father.

Mother Name
Mother Name is the name of the musician’s mother.

Webpage
Webpage refers to the musician’s personal official website URL.

IPI Number
IPI Number refers to the identification number included with some musician names in the Performer_Registry.csv data table.

City
City is used as a term for the place where a musician is born or resides, as recorded in the data tables.
